/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libpubsub2_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so -o libpubsub2_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/pubsub2_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/pubsub2_interfaces/msg/_filtro_sensor_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/mariola/visual_ws/build/pubsub2_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so libpubsub2_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libpubsub2_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
